description: Multi-label attribute schema for clothing items. Each image crop contains exactly one garment.

classes.name: t_shirt
classes.note: short-sleeve knit top, no collar or buttons

classes.name: shirt
classes.note: woven fabric, usually collared and buttoned

classes.name: sweater
classes.note: knit top, long sleeve, no zip/hood

classes.name: jacket
classes.note: outer layer, hip-length, structured shell

classes.name: coat
classes.note: outer layer, knee-length or longer

classes.name: down_jacket
classes.note: quilted/puffer outer layer with fill

classes.name: pants
classes.note: lower body, full-length legs

classes.name: skirt
classes.note: lower body, no leg separation

classes.name: dress
classes.note: one-piece top + skirt combined

classes.name: vest
classes.note: sleeveless outer or mid layer

classes.name: summer
classes.note: thin, breathable; worn in heat

classes.name: spring_autumn
classes.note: medium weight; layering pieces

classes.name: winter
classes.note: heavy insulation; cold weather

classes.name: cotton_like
classes.note: woven cotton, linen, chambray — soft and flat

classes.name: knit
classes.note: knitted jersey, ribbed, waffle — stretchy

classes.name: denim
classes.note: denim twill — stiff woven

classes.name: wool_like
classes.note: wool, cashmere, fleece — warm and textured

classes.name: padded_down_like
classes.note: quilted or puffed shell with insulation fill

classes.name: leather_like
classes.note: genuine or synthetic leather/suede — smooth/shiny

classes.name: synthetic_sportswear
classes.note: polyester/nylon athletic fabrics — slick surface

classes.name: mixed_unknown
classes.note: unclear or genuinely mixed construction

fold_state.description: Physical folding/compression state at photo time

classes.name: unfolded
classes.note: laid flat or hung; full shape visible

classes.name: folded
classes.note: neatly folded; layered rectangle visible

classes.name: partially_folded
classes.note: one or two folds; shape still partly visible

classes.name: compressed
classes.note: vacuum-packed or tightly rolled; volume minimized

classes.name: light
classes.note: < ~200 gsm; sheer, thin, drapes easily

classes.name: medium
classes.note: ~200–400 gsm; standard everyday fabrics

classes.name: heavy
classes.note: > ~400 gsm; dense, stiff, or heavily insulated

pressed_size_class.description: Resulting bulk/volume when normally folded (not vacuum-compressed). Captures storage footprint independent of fabric weight.

classes.name: pocket_size
classes.note: stuffs into its own pocket or a fist-sized pouch; packable down, thin synthetics

classes.name: compact
classes.note: small flat stack fitting in a bag corner; thin tees, light shirts, leggings

classes.name: standard
classes.note: normal folded pile for that garment type; regular sweaters, chinos, casual jackets

classes.name: bulky
classes.note: large stack, hard to reduce further; heavy wool coats, thick denim, uncompressed heavy outerwear

folded_size_class.description: Flat 2D footprint (length × width) when normally folded without pressing. Captures how much shelf/drawer area the garment occupies.

classes.name: xs
classes.note: palm-sized, ≤ ~15×20 cm; packable items, very small tees

classes.name: s
classes.note: book-sized, ~20×30 cm; thin tees, light shirts, leggings

classes.name: m
classes.note: A4-sized, ~30×40 cm; standard sweaters, regular pants, shirts

classes.name: l
classes.note: larger than A4, ~40×50 cm+; heavy coats, bulky outerwear, wide garments

label_format.description: Each labeled sample is one JSON object (one garment crop).
